title: Export specified parameters to a CSV file
description: Export selected or visible elements with specified parameters to a CSV file.

export_path.description: Full path for the CSV export file (default: Desktop/Elements.csv).

scope.description: Whether to export selected or visible elements (default: selected).

parameters.description: List of parameter names to include (case-insensitive).

include_type_parameters.description: If true, includes type parameters as well.
